ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the post was made */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread where the post is located */,
  "prompt_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prompt that inspired the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "has_keyword" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the post contains a specific keyword */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted, flagged, reviewed) */,
  "edit_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last edit to the post */,
  "edit_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last edited the post */,
  "flag_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been flagged */,
  "last_flag_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last flag */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the moderator who reviewed the post (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_prompt_id FOREIGN KEY ("prompt_id") REFERENCES prompts ("prompt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_has_keyword FOREIGN KEY ("has_keyword") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_edit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("edit_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the thread belongs to */,
  "created_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the thread was created */,
  "last_post_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last post in the thread */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Total number of posts in the thread */,
  "last_post_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the last post */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the thread is pinned to the top of the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_last_post_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_post_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prompts" (
  "prompt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prompt */,
  "prompt_title" TEXT /* Title of the prompt */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prompt */,
  "active_from" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the prompt becomes active */,
  "active_to" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the prompt ends */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the prompt */,
  "last_updated_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update to the prompt */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the prompt */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts inspired by the prompt */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the engagement level of the prompt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prompt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prompts_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prompts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the user joined */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website or social media link */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts made by the user */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads started by the user */,
  "flag_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's posts have been flagged */,
  "last_login_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword or phrase tracked within posts */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword or its significance */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts containing the keyword */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the engagement level of the keyword */,
  "related_keywords" TEXT /* A list of related keywords (comma-separated string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)
